page_content:
BUSM741 Financial Restructuring (2 Credits) Focuses on identifying ways to increase ﬁrm value through corporate restructuring. Speciﬁc topics include: mergers and tender offers, spin- offs, carve-outs, divestitures, takeover defense strategies, leveraged buy-outs, and international acquisitions. Additionally, the theory, practice and empirical evidence related to each of these topics will be covered. Emphasis will be placed on valuation analysis and strategic considerations. Prerequisite: BUSM610. Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program; or permission of BMGT-Robert H. Smith School of Business. Credit Only Granted for: BUFN752 or BUSM741.
